ksa_text: Ability to conduct risk assessments and analyses of systems, processes, and operational environments to identify, evaluate, and prioritize compliance-related and operational risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Risk Management falls outside the primary competency scope of the Data Platform Team Lead. This ability KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Risk Management truly out-of-scope for the Data Platform Team Lead? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Risk Management as a core or recommended competency for the Data Platform Team Lead. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Risk Management falls outside the established competency profile for the Data Platform Team Lead. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Risk Management is outside the competency scope of the Data Platform Team Lead. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
